name: zowe-mcp-vscode
description: Zowe MCP Server for z/OS - provides AI tools for data sets, jobs, and UNIX System Services
author: Zowe

zowe-mcp.mockDataDir.description: Absolute path to a mock data directory. When set, the MCP server starts in mock mode using a filesystem-backed z/OS backend instead of connecting to a real mainframe. Use the 'Zowe MCP: Generate Mock Data' command to create one. Leave empty to disable mock mode. Changes require restarting the MCP server.

zowe-mcp.logLevel.description: Minimum log level for the Zowe MCP Server. Changes take effect immediately without restarting.

zowe-mcp.nativeSystems.description: Connection specs for Zowe Native (SSH) backend: user@hostname or user@hostname:port (e.g. USERID@sys1.example.com). When non-empty, the MCP server starts with the native backend instead of mock. Passwords are stored in the shared Zowe secret namespace (zowe.ssh.password.*). Changes require restarting the MCP server.

scripts.build:server: npm run build -w zowe-mcp-server && npm run bundle:server
scripts.build:all: npm run build:server && npm run build
scripts.build-and-install: npm run package && npm run install-extension
